hard_constraints: DO NOT modify any of the 304 canonical nodes (read-only graph).
DO NOT auto-create nodes. Missing concepts go ONLY to proposed_nodes_review_queue.
Every machine mapping is AI-proposed and interpretive -> status='machine_proposed', scholar_review_required=true until reviewed.
The 214 verses already in ayah_index (from human-curated node quranic_basis) are status='canonical_curated' and are NOT re-proposed or overwritten.
No ayah record may upgrade an inferred node link to 'direct'; the relevance label is preserved, never inflated.
principle: Claude proposes candidate concept tags and cause-effect reads from grounded verse text + established translations; deterministic code does node-matching, validation, dedup, and confidence scoring. Nothing becomes canonical without human+scholar review.

stages.name: source_loader
stages.in: public-domain Quran text (Uthmani) + 2-3 established translations keyed by surah:ayah
stages.notes: Vetted corpus (e.g. Tanzil); store text hash for idempotency. Pipeline reads scripture, never paraphrases it as its own output.

stages.name: dedup_gate
stages.notes: Skip surah:ayah already canonical_curated; skip unchanged hashes.

stages.name: candidate_concept_extractor
stages.notes: Claude under audit/ai.py grounding rules: extract themes ONLY from supplied text+translations; forbid ruling/fatwa language; JSON with self-rated certainty.

stages.name: node_matcher
stages.notes: Deterministic embedding match vs 304 node short_definition+signals; threshold tau_match; below -> gap signal.

stages.name: signal_mapper
stages.notes: INHERIT from matched canonical nodes; link decision_relevance to hikma_decision_pathways by shared nodes.

stages.name: cause_effect_linker
stages.notes: Propose action->consequence ONLY where the verse text explicitly states it; mark interpretive; never assert causation absent in text.

stages.name: confidence_grader
stages.notes: confidence=f(similarity, certainty, translation agreement). machine_proposed capped at 'medium'; legal/ruling-adjacent forced 'low'.

stages.name: gap_detector
stages.notes: Recurring concept with NO node >= tau across >=N verses -> PROPOSED node (suggestion+rationale+supporting ayat). NEVER auto-added.

stages.name: review_router
stages.notes: machine_proposed -> analyst -> scholar. canonical_curated bypass to merged index.

stages.name: index_writer
stages.notes: machine_proposed stays in staging index, NOT live ayah_index, until promoted.

mapping_rules: Map to a node only if candidate-to-node similarity >= tau_match (default 0.62, tunable).
mapped_nodes MUST already exist; the matcher cannot mint ids.
domains/moral_questions/signals are INHERITED from mapped nodes, never authored per ayah.
relevance_label from textual support: explicit term->'direct'; thematic->'inferred'; only-modern-bridge->'modern_application'. Default to weaker label under doubt.
Concept with no node >= tau recurring across >=3 verses -> proposed_nodes_review_queue (not the graph).
Ritual/legal/eschatological verses with no decision bearing -> mapped_nodes may be empty; do not force a mapping.
validation_rules: schema_complete: all required fields present and typed.
node_existence: every mapped/principle id exists in graph_index (else reject).
no_node_mutation: output never writes to the 304 node files (CI file-hash check).
confidence_bounds: machine_proposed in {low,medium}; high only after scholar_reviewed.
scholar_flag: scholar_review_required=true unless scholar_reviewed or canonical_curated.
label_no_inflation: 'direct' only if the node's own canonical quranic_basis already cites this ayah as direct.
dedup: no duplicate ayah_id live; canonical_curated wins over machine_proposed.
idempotency: unchanged text_hash -> no new record.

transitions: analyst_reviewed --scholar approves--> scholar_reviewed (flag cleared, may raise confidence)
scholar_reviewed --promotion job--> merged into live ayah_index
proposed node --scholar accepts--> hands to SEPARATE human node-authoring task; pipeline still never auto-adds
review_workflow.gate: Only scholar_reviewed + canonical_curated enter the live ayah_index served to engines; machine_proposed stays in a labelled staging index.

batch_plan.order: short/most-cited surahs first to validate matcher early
batch_plan.throughput: prompt cache per surah; rate-limit; checkpoint per surah

quality_checks: coverage: % processed; % with >=1 mapped node; % empty (expected for ritual/legal).
matcher_precision: human spot-check per surah; track false-map rate.
constraint_audit: 304 node files byte-identical pre/post run.
label_audit: count of 'direct' not backed by canonical citation must be 0.
queue_health: proposed queue size + dedup vs existing nodes.
regression: existing 214 canonical mappings unchanged after merge.
